D

deletePhysicalFile() - Method in class basicFiles.files.BaseFile
Physically deletes the file from the file system.
deletePhysicalFile() - Method in class basicFiles.files.BinaryFile
Physically removes the file from the file system.
deletePhysicalFile() - Method in class basicFiles.files.Folder
Recursively deletes all physical files and sub-directories contained within this folder, followed by the folder itself.
deletePhysicalFile() - Method in class basicFiles.files.medias.Audio
Physically deletes the file from the filesystem and flushes the playback clip.
deletePhysicalFile() - Method in class basicFiles.files.medias.Image
Deletes the physical file from the system and flushes the image buffer.
deletePhysicalFile() - Method in class basicFiles.files.TabularFile
 
deletePhysicalFile() - Method in class basicFiles.files.TextFile
 
deletePhysicalFile() - Method in class bigFiles.files.BigBinaryFile
 
deletePhysicalFile() - Method in class bigFiles.files.BigFile
Deletes the physical file from the disk.
deletePhysicalFile() - Method in class bigFiles.files.BigFolder
Recursively deletes all physical files and subfolders.
deletePhysicalFile() - Method in class bigFiles.files.BigTabularFile
 
deletePhysicalFile() - Method in class bigFiles.files.BigTextFile
 
deletePhysicalFile() - Method in class bigFiles.files.medias.BigAudio
Physically deletes the file from the file system.
deletePhysicalFile() - Method in class bigFiles.files.medias.BigImage
Physically deletes the file from the filesystem.
